en.name: Level 20 — Boreas Structure
en.shortDescription: An amusement facility split into the Waiting Halls (lockers, vending) and the Electric (deadly game rooms), bitterly cold and paranoia-inducing.
en.atmosphere: Eerie artificially-lit amusement palace sinking into darkness and extreme cold, with breathing/wind hallucinations and phantom snow.
en.tips: Don't read expedition logs before entry. Use staff-only doors in the Waiting Halls to exit fast. Win games for supplies; losing teleports you.
